items.title: Set up your personal cloud this Prime Day and cut subscription costs with UGREEN NAS systems from $176
items.summary: As part of Amazon’s Prime Day sale, UGREEN’s official storefront is offering huge discounts on its NAS systems. You can save up to 30% on these system, and the sale even include some fairly new models like the NAS DXP2800 GT, and the prices starting at $176 right now. You can get started with something like the NASync DH2300 2-Bay Desktop NAS for $175.99 shipped. It launched late last year at $210 and has been selling closer to $220 lately, so today’s deal takes $44 off and lands within $8 of the all-time low. Add your own drives to this and it can serve as a personal cloud for photos, videos, documents, and backups that you can access from your devices without paying for more iCloud, Google One, or Dropbox storage every month.
